content:
✨ aya | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing a user-friendly desktop GUI for managing and debugging Android devices connected via ADB.
✨ Key Features: • Screen mirror • File explorer • Application manager • Process monitor • Layout inspector
📖 Summary: AYA is a desktop application that provides a graphical user interface for controlling Android devices via ADB. It simplifies common development and debugging tasks by offering a visual wrapper around the command-line ADB tool.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
